circuit_rules.warning: CRITICAL: High current! Add a 220-ohm resistor to prevent LED burnout.
LOGIC ERROR: DHT11 requires a 4.7k-10k pull-up resistor on the data line for stable readings.
STABILITY: Add decoupling capacitors (0.1uF/10uF) to the regulator input/output to prevent oscillation.
FLOATING PIN: Use a pull-down resistor (10k) to prevent random triggering of the button input.
POWER: Motors draw high current. Do not power the L298N directly from the ESP32/Arduino 5V pin.
WIRING: Ensure both SDA and SCL lines are connected. Check for missing 4.7k pull-up resistors if using long wires.
